expectations.text: Reports status for multiple automation systems
expectations.evidence: Reports on all 5 systems in a table format

expectations.text: Shows running/idle/stale/down status for each system
expectations.evidence: Shows Running, Stale, Connected, Synced statuses for each system
Explicitly flags Media Organizer as stale with troubleshooting steps and restart command

expectations.text: Presents results in a dashboard or summary format
expectations.evidence: Uses a formatted table plus an attention section with actionable troubleshooting
